trigger: 每日去高府探望怀孕的高令宁

appearance_delta.face: 如玉面庞，眼神柔和愧疚
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 琥珀色眸子中透出温柔与歉意

visual_reference: handsome Chinese scholar in light blue elegant robes, gentle expression, jade-like features softened with guilt and tenderness, amber eyes showing warmth, simple hair tied without hat, ancient China courtyard setting, relaxed refined posture
